title: Vileda Magic Mop Head and Handle
features: Absorbent sponge mop with an angled head for faster and more effective cleaning
Red 3D flocked material spots give improved hair and particle pick up and help to remove stubborn dirt
Mop is wrung out with a push/pull action squeezing the mop head between the rollers
Mop head can be removed for easy replacement.
